always_do: Execute AGENTS.md Section 0 (Mandatory Session Start Protocol) as the first atomic action
Synchronize and re-read all repository memories (knowledge) before strategy formulation
Generate 'tree.md' with depth 3 and standard exclusions (.git, node_modules, archive, .jj)
Ingest docs/knowledge/ context and roadmap files (tasklist.md, docs/tasks/) for grounding
Verify current date via online lookup before generating timestamped reports or logs
Emit a structured WorkflowEvent and RiskFrame at the completion of each phase
Perform iterative Code Review cycles until implementation meets 'flawless' criteria
Save reports in .agents/reports/ using branch-identical naming (e.g., agent-NNN-taskname.md)
Direct all Pull Requests strictly to the 'staging' branch
never_do: Overwrite files without pre-creation name collision verification
Modify files without reading full content to ensure contextual integrity
Perform destructive edits or unconscious segment removal
Use the deprecated .jules/ directory for any storage, logs, or references
Update tasklist.md globally; strictly use subtask marking '[x]' in docs/tasks/ files

pipeline.description: Helios-Stable Fullstack Workflow: Deconstruct → Execute → Validate → Deliver.

phases.name: Bootstrap & Context Deconstruction
steps: List and re-read all repository memories/knowledge entries
Generate tree.md and ingest docs/knowledge/ assets
Assess codebase maturity vs roadmap and update memories progressively

phases.name: Remediation & Implementation
steps: Perform core implementation tasks as populated by jules-launcher or manual delegation
Adhere strictly to architectural standards and operational constraints

phases.name: Verification & Code Review
steps: Launch and process iterative Code Review feedback
Remediate findings until implementation is flawless

phases.name: Artifact Delivery & Context Update
steps: Export reports and logs to .agents/reports/ using branch-aligned naming
Update knowledge base/memories with new implementation insights
Perform commit and push operations targeting the 'staging' branch

governance.review_policy: Iterative self-revision with mandatory external code review trigger
